reviews.review_description: Eggscape has huge potential, but it's currently crippled by technical instability. Frequent failures to fully load levels, random audio muting, and severe stuttering make gameplay nearly impossible. The new first-person view is visually jarring and unnecessary. With each new update it keeps getting worse. Until these core problems are fixed, Eggscape remains very frustrating.
Really enjoying it! Thanks for the delivery and price point of this lil-BIG game. Its Egggselent!😍🥰🙃😁

reviews.review_title: Wonderful MR game for all ages!
reviews.review_description: Whoa! This is the perfect Mixed Reality experience. The entire family loves playing it together over multiple headsets or on our own when we have a few eggies to spare. It’s easy to pick up, great for all ages, and makes clever use of the Quest’s passthrough feature so it feels like the action is really happening in your space. Its design is fun and hilarious, with charming animation, goofy sound effects, and just the right amount of chaos. Perfect for parties or showing off what mixed reality can do. Definitely excited to see where this game goes and its mad worlds grow into.

This game is best described as FUN. It's like a really intense party.

Edit: Improvements? At first it was a bit crashy, but that seems to be fixed now so I updated my rating. Awesome game!
I'm really enjoying playing this game. Since everyone makes up their own name in it you don't know who you are playing with. I wish there was a way to friend some of the players in the game itself.
First time playing this type of game, had a blast! Issue with adding friends with their code. Had to join a room together and add that way. It also needs a player list with mute function.
Seems to be the only true platformer on quest. Love it, simple fun, easy to join friends for multiplayer egg related carnage.

Coming back to my review after a couple weeks, as they are still in early access, but the updates to the levels/courses has been so satisfying! Thank you devs for being so open to feedback and listening to your community! I hope my EGG can slide on its belly on certain surfaces or down tubes & maybe a way to mute the lobby

I really love the overall design and the characters — they’re full of charm! The level design looks playful and fun, which adds a lot to the vibe. The main menu looks great too, but I often ended up on empty screens with no way to return other than restarting the game.

The gameplay is fun, but at the moment, it feels more like a lucky accident when I get through a section, rather than skill-based platforming. Also, the characters can get visually lost in the busy environments, so it might help if the camera distance could be adjusted.

Checkpoints could be made clearer, and maybe add a bit more drama to dying — like having the egg crack, for example. Overall, it’s a really enjoyable experience and definitely has potential, but it still feels like a work in progress. Keep going — the world needs more unique platformers like this!

I think this game is eggsellent🥚, and I recommend it to anyone who might want to try it out, but I have some suggestions that I think would improve both the level creation and gameplay. A problem I experience while trying to delete objects in the level maker is sometimes deleting the wrong object. I think the best way to solve this is to have a red outline around the object that is going to be deleted when you hold the grip button, and the object deletes when you release it. Sometimes when you are playing a level, a new area spawns in and you have to move to whole map to see your character. This can be annoying in a game where speed is necessary to get those points. If the map re-centers when you hit a checkpoint, it would allow for much smoother gameplay. I think a free mobile app with cross platform play would bring lots more people to your game. If they buy it they might get it on a headset, and they could still buy cosmetics earning you more money💵 .Thank you for reading and I will continue to play your amazing game.

developer_response.body:
my friend you gave amazing suggestions. sorry for taking long to respond here. We are working on it! expect big updates over the next 6 months. Join our discord for more info discord.gg/eggscape
THANK YOU!

I would be happy to pay for this game or even dlc content , its definitely earned for such a cool experience.

This game is genuinely, the best MR game I have ever played, The Community is very kind, the game is well made, the bugs mostly happen if you search for them, The cosmetics are beautiful and the Devs care about Players and Their creative ideas. If you are reading this and don’t have that game, what are you waiting for? Play this game NOW!

This game is an original masterpiece 
You are an egg but you play in 3rd perspective 
You can make a race type of obstacle or Kill enemies using weapons!
You can build your own map using your controllers and having a variety of stuff to build with!
Eggpscape is underrated and I feel it is a game every one should try!

reviews.review_description:
Egg Space VR - A Whimsical Adventure for All Ages!

Egg Space VR is a delightful and imaginative virtual reality experience that combines humor, creativity, and engaging gameplay. From the moment you step into its quirky world, you’re greeted by charming visuals and a lighthearted narrative that keeps you smiling throughout.

The game strikes a perfect balance between exploration and puzzles, challenging your mind while ensuring you’re constantly entertained. The controls are intuitive, making it accessible for newcomers to VR and experienced players alike. The playful environment is rich with interactive elements, encouraging curiosity and rewarding exploration.

What truly sets Egg Space VR apart is its unique charm and attention to detail. Every aspect of the game, from its whimsical design to the cleverly crafted challenges, feels polished and thoughtfully created.

Whether you’re looking for a relaxing escape or a fun-filled adventure, Egg Space VR delivers an unforgettable experience. It’s a must-try for anyone who loves inventive gameplay and a good laugh!

reviews.review_title: This game is really fun to play
reviews.review_description: This game has potential. The egg people are so very TINY that maybe add some height to them.  not many people are making or creating levels in this game, so you're not going to be able to go to other people's levels. The controls can be a little finicky sometimes, but since this game is so fun, you kind of forget about it. I have paid the $26 and some change for this game to be able to create levels and to share them. Please expand the limit. I have paid the money. Make limited span for people who are just trying the game. I hope more people will make a level and share them because I'm planning on doing it, that's for sure. I hope they add more items so that you can make the game even better.. The devs did a great job! Keep up the good work, guys. Sending positive vibes to everyone .Come join me on EGGSCAPE if you dare👈😁

developer_response.body: THANK YOU for the energy here! You absolutely get it and you're bringing up items that we're discussing every day. Would love to have you join our discord chat if you feel like it. This game is a work in progress and we're very much learning how to take it to the next level. Particularly the scale is something we're playing with... brainstorming on the ability to modify it with the move world feature. Also considering adding a first person mode. World builder will be open and free soon, and much less limited. For those early adopters that got it in the very beginning there will be exclusive rewards forever and special WB pieces. Thanks again!! Looking forward to chatting with you further. I'm gman on discord.

reviews.review_description: Buyer beware!  The Master Creator option is a $25 In-App Purchase that is NON-REFUNDABLE and doesn't let you test your level.  Yes it may be a Beta, but because of Meta's refund policy, if it doesn't work and isn't fixed you are out of luck.
